---
title: "Succulent Karoo"
author:
  - name:
      given:  
      family:  
    orcid: 0000-0002-2726-7886 
    affiliations:
      - ref:  
      - ref: 
  - name:
      given:  
      family:  
    orcid:  
    affiliations:
      - ref: 
      - ref: 
 
affiliations:
  - id: 1 # Use this as the affiliation ref with authors above
    number: 1 # This number is used to associate authors with affiliations
    name: 

  - id: 2 # Use this as the affiliation ref with authors above
    number: 2 # This number is used to associate authors with affiliations
    name: 
    
# Remember to rename the default .bib file and change the name here
bibliography: references.bib
---

## Ecological Context

## Vegetation units

## Key pressures

## Remote sensing approaches

## Key resources
